articles.title: Dark Mode Support Added
articles.description: We've added a new dark mode toggle to improve your experience during night hours. Switch between light and dark themes with a single click!
articles.fullContent:
We're excited to announce that dark mode is now available in the Utility Dashboard!

What's New:

  • Toggle between light and dark themes using the moon/sun icon
  • Your theme preference is automatically saved
  • Smooth transitions between themes
  • Improved eye comfort in low-light environments

How to Use: Click the moon icon (🌙) in the top right corner of the dashboard to switch to dark mode. Click the sun icon (☀️) to return to light mode.

Your preference will be remembered the next time you visit!

articles.title: About Page & Update Articles Launched
articles.description: New About page now displays articles about the latest updates and improvements. Stay informed about what's new!
articles.fullContent:
Welcome to our new About & Updates section!

What's Included:

  • 📰 Dedicated About page with update articles
  • 📌 Latest features and improvements posted here
  • 🏷️ Categorized with tags (Feature, Fix, Performance)
  • 🔍 Click any article to read the full details

Why This Matters: You'll now be able to stay informed about new features, bug fixes, and improvements as they're released. Simply click the 📰 icon on the dashboard to browse all updates.

Articles are listed with the most recent first, making it easy to catch the latest changes!

articles.title: Performance Improvements
articles.description: Optimized dashboard loading times and reduced data usage. The app now loads 30% faster!
articles.fullContent:
We've made significant performance improvements to make your experience faster and smoother.

Performance Enhancements:

  • Dashboard loading time reduced by 30%
  • Optimized API calls to reduce data usage
  • Improved chart rendering performance
  • Better caching of frequently accessed data
  • Reduced memory footprint

What You'll Notice:

  • Faster login process
  • Quicker data updates
  • Smoother page transitions
  • Better performance on mobile devices

Thank you for your patience as we continue to optimize the platform!

articles.title: Email Verification System Enhanced
articles.description: Improved email verification process with better security and clearer instructions for subscribers.
articles.fullContent:
We've enhanced our email verification system to provide better security and user experience.

Improvements Made:

  • Streamlined verification code process
  • Clear on-screen instructions for subscribers
  • Better error messages if verification fails
  • Automatic retry mechanism
  • Enhanced security validation

How It Works:

  1. Click 'Enable Email Updates' on the dashboard
  2. Enter your email address
  3. Check your inbox for the verification code
  4. Enter the 8-character code to confirm

Your email preferences are now stored securely and will persist across sessions!

articles.title: Usage Trends & Analytics Released
articles.description: New analytics features show your 12-month usage trends, average consumption, and monthly comparisons.
articles.fullContent:
We're excited to introduce comprehensive usage analytics and trends!

New Features:

  • 📈 12-month usage trend charts
  • 💡 Calculate your monthly averages
  • 📊 Compare usage across months
  • 🎯 See if your consumption is increasing or decreasing
  • 📋 Download reports for your records

What's Tracked:

  • Electric consumption
  • Water usage
  • Gas consumption

Use these insights to monitor your consumption patterns and identify opportunities to save on bills!

articles.title: Payment Gateway Integration
articles.description: Seamless payment processing now available through multiple payment methods for your convenience.
articles.fullContent:
Paying your utility bills is now easier than ever!

Payment Options Available:

  • 💳 Multiple payment gateways supported
  • 🔒 Secure payment processing
  • 📱 Mobile-friendly payment interface
  • ✅ Instant payment confirmation
  • 📧 Receipt emailed automatically

How to Pay:

  1. Click '💳 Make Payment' on the dashboard
  2. Select your payment method
  3. Follow the secure payment process
  4. Receive confirmation immediately

Your payment history is automatically tracked and available for download!
